$uid..validate: newData.hasChildren(['nickname','score','totalTime','clearedAt']) && newData.child('score').isNumber() && newData.child('score').val() >= 0 && newData.child('score').val() <= 10000 && newData.child('totalTime').isNumber() && newData.child('totalTime').val() >= 290 && newData.child('nickname').isString() && newData.child('nickname').val().length >= 1 && newData.child('nickname').val().length <= 20
